notes: Can describe a person's character (humble, modest) or living conditions (modest, simple). Also exists as a verb 'bescheiden' (to inform/decide officially), but the adjective is far more common.

sentences.german: Er ist trotz seines Erfolgs sehr bescheiden geblieben.
sentences.english: He has remained very modest despite his success.

sentences.german: Sie leben in bescheidenen Verhältnissen, aber sie sind glücklich.
sentences.english: They live in modest circumstances, but they are happy.
